ham.subject: Updated Company Leave Policy – Effective 1 May 2026
ham.body:
Hi Team,

I hope you’re all doing well. As part of our ongoing commitment to support work‑life balance, we have updated the Company Leave Policy. Please review the attached document and note the following key changes:

1. **Annual Paid Leave** – 25 days for all full‑time employees, with a 5‑day carry‑over limit.
2. **Sick Leave** – 12 days per calendar year, with a new electronic check‑in process.
3. **Parental Leave** – expanded to 12 weeks for maternity and 8 weeks for paternity, with flexible work‑from‑home options.
4. **Bereavement Leave** – 3 days for immediate family members, 1 additional day for extended family.
5. **Public Holidays** – all statutory holidays remain unchanged.

Please read the policy in its entirety on the intranet under HR Documents or download the PDF attachment. If you have any questions, feel free to reach out to HR at hr@company.com.

Thank you for your attention to these updates.

Best regards,

Sarah Mitchell
HR Manager
Company Inc.

spam.subject: URGENT: Your FedEx Package Delivery Resolved – Action Required
spam.body:
Dear Valued Customer,

Our records indicate that your scheduled FedEx shipment (Tracking #123456789) was not delivered on the promised date. To avoid further delay, an additional delivery fee of $32.50 has been applied to your account. Please verify your shipping address and confirm the payment of the outstanding fee within the next 24 hours.

Failure to do so may result in the shipment being returned to the sender at your expense. For your security, we require a quick confirmation via the link below:

<URL>

Once we receive your confirmation, we will expedite the delivery at no extra cost to you. Thank you for choosing FedEx.

Sincerely,

FedEx Customer Support
